title: Recovery Online
author: Ned

seo.title: Free Addiction and Mental Health Resources in St. Louis
seo.description: Explore comprehensive resources for addiction and mental health treatment in St. Louis, including treatment providers and support groups like Alcoholics Anonymous and Narcotics Anonymous tailored to various communities

body:
Free resources for addiction and mental health.

L﻿ocating treatment

T﻿he Substance Abuse and Mental Health Administration maintains a website where you can find mental health and addiction treatment providers, including buprenorphine and methadone providers. The site allows you to search by location, type of treatment needed, and payment type.

St Louis support and mutual aid groups for addiction recovery

Alcoholics Anonymous St. Louis

The only requirement for membership in AA is a desire to stop drinking.  There are no dues or fees for AA membership. Meeting locations and times.

While many AA meetings are open to all, some are set aside for specific groups:

  • Women’s AA meetings
  • Men’s AA meetings
  • AA Meetings for nonbinary individuals
  • AA Meetings for trans individuals
  • Young people’s AA meetings
  • Spanish-speaking AA meetings
  • LGBTQ AA meetings
  • Non-religious AA meetings
  • AA meetings where childcare is provided

Narcotics Anonymous St. Louis

The only requirement for membership in NA is a desire to stop using.  There are no dues or fees for NA membership. Meeting locations and times
